title: Pan-Seared Bean Fritters
description: Crispy bean fritters with a hint of tanginess, perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: Heat the fry in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the Algerian bean and cook for 3-4 minutes, until lightly browned.
In a bowl, mix the tangy stir with 1 tablespoon of water.
Add the tangy stir mixture to the pan and stir to combine.
Using a spoon, shape the bean mixture into small patties.
Fry the patties in the hot fry until crispy and golden brown.
